roundup.title: Grok 4.5 & SWE-1.7 Drive Agent Model Surge
roundup.subtitle: Grok 4.5 上线 Cursor 与 OpenRouter，SWE-1.7 与 Nemotron 3 Ultra 推动开源 Agent 落地
headline: @cursor_ai 与 @SpaceXAI 合作训练 Grok 4.5，使其成为首个面向工程与 Agent 任务的前沿模型，@OpenRouter 立即上线支持。@NVIDIAAI 与 @LangChain 共同优化 Deep Agents harness，Nemotron 3 Ultra 实现基准 0.86 分且成本大幅降低。
@cognition 发布 SWE-1.7 模型，在 Devin 中以 1000 tok/s 速度运行，性能接近前沿闭源模型，@elonmusk 指出 Grok 4.5 后续推理速度可再翻倍。@ValsAI 确认 Grok 4.5 在 Harvey Legal Benchmark 取得 SOTA。
@OpenAI 推出 GPT-Live 全双工语音模型，ChatGPT 今日起全量上线，实现更自然的实时对话体验。@allen_ai 开源 MolmoAct 2 视觉-语言-动作模型，单周末即可构建获奖机器人应用。
@emollick 提醒前沿模型需发布完整 model card 与评测，@reach_vb 指出 SWE-Bench Pro 已失效 30% 任务，推动 coding eval 更新。

deepDives.title: Grok 4.5 正式发布
deepDives.summary: SpaceXAI 与 Cursor 合作打造的 Grok 4.5 今日上线，专注长时程工程与 Agent 任务，OpenRouter 即刻可用。

facts.text: Grok 4.5 已上线 OpenRouter，支持 Cursor 集成
facts.quote: Grok 4.5 is live now on OpenRouter! Cursor’s contributions have helped make @SpaceXAI’s model frontier-level on long-horizon engineering tasks.

facts.text: Grok 4.5 由 NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 系统训练
facts.quote: trained on NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems and purpose-built for coding, agentic tasks

bullish.text: Grok 4.5 性能媲美 GPT-5.5 且更便宜

deepDives.title: SWE-1.7 与 Nemotron 3 Ultra Agent 发布
deepDives.summary: Cognition 发布 SWE-1.7，NVIDIA 与 LangChain 推出 NemoClaw Deep Agents Blueprint，开源 Agent 性能追平闭源且成本显著降低。

facts.text: SWE-1.7 在 Devin 中以 1000 tok/s 运行
facts.quote: SWE-1.7 is available today in Devin across Web, Desktop, and CLI, running at 1000 tok/s

facts.text: NemoClaw 实现 10x 更低推理成本

bullish.text: frontier performance at a fraction of the cost

bullets.text: Claude Managed Agents 支持子代理分层委托与独立缓存
Pi harness 以 2x 更低成本达到 Opus/GPT 同等成功率
Grok 4.5 在 Vals Index 得分 65.3%，较 Grok 4.3 提升近 20 个点
bullets.quote: landing at #6 on the Vals Index (65.3%) and nearly 20 percentage points better than Grok 4.3

bullets.text: GLM-5.2 量化后体积缩减 >70% 且 GPQA 保持 SOTA
bullets.quote: reduces the model size by >70% while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy recovery on GPQA

bullets.text: Together AI 推出预留吞吐量服务，成本较 Opus 4.8 低 90%
bullets.quote: up to 90% lower cost vs. Opus 4.8

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: 与 SpaceXAI 合作训练 Grok 4.5，成为最强编码与 Agent 模型
topTweets.whyItMatters: 标志 Cursor 从软件工程扩展至通用 Agent 领域

topTweets.author: @cognition
topTweets.text: SWE-1.7 以 1000 tok/s 速度在 Devin 全平台上线
topTweets.whyItMatters: 展示 RL 在长时程 coding Agent 的持续突破

topTweets.author: @LangChain
topTweets.text: NemoClaw Deep Agents Blueprint 实现 10x 成本降低
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源 Agent 蓝图首次达到基准领先水平

topTweets.author: @OpenAI
topTweets.text: GPT-Live 语音模型今日在 ChatGPT 全量上线
topTweets.whyItMatters: 自然全双工语音交互进入生产阶段

topTweets.author: @NVIDIAAI
topTweets.text: Nemotron 3 Ultra + LangChain 实现前沿性能低成本 Agent
topTweets.whyItMatters: NVIDIA 开源 Agent 栈进入企业可用阶段

takeaways: 前沿模型发布需同步 model card 与 benchmark 结果，避免社区质疑。
Agent harness 与开源模型组合已成为性价比最高的生产路径。
coding eval 基准（如 SWE-Bench Pro）已失效，企业需自建任务集。
语音与多模态交互模型进入全双工实时时代，产品形态加速迭代。
消费级硬件推理优化持续降低部署门槛，6 年内或可本地训练前沿模型。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Grok 4.5 is live now on OpenRouter! Cursor’s contributions have helped make @SpaceXAI’s model frontier-level on long-horizon engineering tasks.
items.whyItMatters: 新 Grok 4.5 模型上线，支持 coding 与 agents，OpenRouter 即刻可用。

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: What can you build with a fully open robotics model in a weekend? 🤖 Robotics engineer @pham_blnh used MolmoAct 2, our open vision-language-action model, in the voice-controlled robot that won @southpkcommons' AI hackathon.
items.whyItMatters: MolmoAct 2 开源机器人模型，单周末即可构建获奖应用。

items.author: @NVIDIAAI
items.text: We've been working with @LangChain to tune their Deep Agents harness for Nemotron 3 Ultra. The result is a fully open, customizable agent that delivers frontier performance at a fraction of the cost of leading closed models.
items.whyItMatters: Nemotron 3 Ultra + LangChain Deep Agents harness，benchmark 0.86 分、成本仅 $4.48。

items.author: @emollick
items.text: Since I am needling every model maker tonight about minor but important issues, one more: Grok 4.5 has no model card. Companies that are trying to compete near the frontier should be releasing model cards and testing results, not just benchmarks!
items.whyItMatters: 前沿模型需发布 model card 与测试结果

items.author: @elonmusk
items.text: Grok 4.5 is not yet using our internally developed C/C++ inference software that exact maps to the GB300 hardware. Doubling or more of the current speed is probably achievable.
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.5 推理速度将翻倍，影响实际部署效率

items.author: @elonmusk
items.text: Grok has always been very strong on law
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.5 在法律 Agent benchmark 夺冠

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: We've partnered with SpaceXAI to train Grok 4.5. It’s our most powerful model yet and the first we've built for more than software engineering.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor集成Grok 4.5，编码模型新标杆

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: Introducing the NemoClaw Deep Agents Blueprint, a reference architecture for building open agent systems developed with @NVIDIA. Benchmark-leading performance. Over 10x lower inference costs.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA+LangChain开源Agent蓝图，成本降10x

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: Introducing GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction. Rolling out in ChatGPT starting today.
items.whyItMatters: GPT-Live语音模型全量上线ChatGPT

items.author: @omarsar0
items.text: Highly-recommended read. Pi harness got the same success rate as harnesses from the LLM vendors with Opus and GPT, but at 2x less cost. GLM 5.2 was a major step forward in open-source coding agent performance.
items.whyItMatters: 开源编码Agent harness成本减半，性能追平

items.author: @kimmonismus
items.text: Seriously, what?! Did NOT expect grok 4.5 to perform THAT well. On par with GPT-5.5, cheaper than opus 4.8. Cursor deal paid off.
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.5性能媲美GPT-5.5且更便宜

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: We’re pleased to have collaborated with AE Studio on this research. New research! Some AI capabilities are both helpful and dangerous... We introduce GRAM, a training method that puts dual-use capabilities into removable modules.
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic GRAM方法分离双用能力，提升安全

items.author: @cognition
items.text: Introducing SWE-1.7, the most capable model we’ve trained yet. It scores within a few points of the strongest frontier models at a fraction of the cost, and is now available at 1000 tok/s. RL is not hitting its limit: after refining our recipe, we keep seeing gains as we scale
items.whyItMatters: SWE-1.7新模型发布，性能接近前沿且成本低、速度快，Agent coding能力提升

items.author: @cognition
items.text: SWE-1.7 is available today in Devin across Web, Desktop, and CLI, running at 1000 tok/s. More details on the training run, infrastructure, data pipeline, and long-horizon behavior in the blog post
items.whyItMatters: Devin集成SWE-1.7，详细训练与基础设施公开，AI软件工程师实用进展

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: OpenWiki 0.0.3 just launched with tons of bug fixes and improvements! 'openai-compatible' provider, deterministic skip, GitLab CI, more coming
items.whyItMatters: LangChain OpenWiki更新，支持任意LLM提供商，代码库自动Wiki实用工具迭代

items.author: @reach_vb
items.text: We audited SWE-Bench Pro, one of the most widely used AI coding benchmarks, and found it no longer reliably measures frontier coding capability. 30% tasks broken, retracting recommendation
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI指出SWE-Bench Pro基准失效，30%任务损坏，推动coding eval更新

items.author: @code
items.text: ⚡ VS Code just shipped a big wave of GitHub Copilot upgrades! 🌐 Build and validate web apps with browser agent tools 🤖 Manage parallel agent workflows with the Agents window (Preview) 🎓 New VS Code Learn courses ✨ Plus Autopilot improvements, model discovery for BYOK, cost visibility, and much more.
items.whyItMatters: VS Code Copilot 新增多代理工作流与浏览器工具，提升 AI 编码效率

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: “Model orchestration is in many ways the natural outgrowth of agentic engineering” Huge thanks to @AndrewYNg and @DeepLearningAI for the deep dive into Sakana AI’s Fugu and Fugu-Ultra. The article highlights how dynamic orchestration allows us to achieve near SOTA performance on benchmarks like GPQA-Diamond, LiveCodeBe
items.whyItMatters: Sakana Fugu 动态编排实现多模型 SOTA 性能，推进 agentic 工程

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: Google just released Gemma 4 Open-weight, natively multimodal language models ranging from 2.3B to 31B parameters. Features include Dense and MoE architectures, an encoder-free 12B variant, and a thinking mode for reasoning.
items.whyItMatters: Google 开源 Gemma 4 多模态模型，支持 MoE 与推理模式

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: We're introducing Provisioned Throughput: reserved inference capacity for frontier open models, with token-based pricing and a 99% uptime SLA. Serverless simplicity, guaranteed capacity, up to 90% lower cost vs. Opus 4.8.
items.whyItMatters: Together AI 提供预留吞吐量，保障前沿开源模型推理 SLA 与低成本

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: OpenAI just rolled out GPT-Live, its next-gen voice model that makes talking to AI "feel much more like having a real conversation". The demo showed off a fast, super smooth back-and-forth without the awkward interruptions or pauses of older voice models.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI GPT-Live 全双工语音模型，实现更自然实时对话

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: bringing your code from @github into ai studio build is as easy as clicking 'import from github'
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 支持一键从 GitHub 导入代码，加速原型开发。

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: See these papers I've co-authored on the subject: [2508.15734] Measuring the environmental impact of delivering AI at Google Scale https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.15734
items.whyItMatters: Google AI 碳排放与环境影响最新论文

items.author: @MiniMax_AI
items.text: Excited to see this go live with the @togethercompute team. As more production workloads move to open models, reliable infrastructure becomes just as important as the models themselves. Proud to see M3 launch with Provisioned Throughput.
items.whyItMatters: MiniMax M3 获预留推理容量支持，生产级部署保障

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Tweak a prompt to fix one complaint, and you may impact performance across other use cases. Move past vibe-checking. Drive disciplined AI engineering with the developer-facing Agent Quality Flywheel and five concrete iteration stages ➡️ https://developers.googleblog.com/driving-the-agent-quality-flywheel-from-your-codi
items.whyItMatters: 系统化 Agent 迭代框架，AI 工程师必读工程实践

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: The next era of Android Bench! 🔹 8 new models added: Claude Fable 5 (leading at 84.5%), GPT 5.5, Sonnet 5, GLM 5.2, and Qwen 3.7 Max... Upgraded methodology: Now using the Harbor Framework...
items.whyItMatters: 新基准+8 模型更新，实时追踪前沿模型性能

items.author: @fal
items.text: Seedream 5.0 Pro is now available on fal. Region-precise editing... Advanced prompt understanding and native text in 14 languages...
items.whyItMatters: 新图像编辑模型上线，区域精准控制与多语言支持

items.author: @GergelyOrosz
items.text: Entire is coming out of stealth: @ashtom, GitHub's last CEO, is building an AI-native GitHub. Thousands of users... I'm an investor... my ONLY investment the last 2 years!
items.whyItMatters: AI 原生 Git 平台出 stealth，GitHub 前 CEO 新作

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: We're teaming up with @OpenAI to launch a first-of-its-kind research pilot! By combining our global network signals with OpenAI’s frontier search capabilities...
items.whyItMatters: Cloudflare + OpenAI 联合研究网络索引优化

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents. We're a small team building open superintelligence... research on Long-horizon agents and Recursive Language Models (RLMs), Automated AI research...
items.whyItMatters: 1.3亿美元融资，专注企业自建AI Agent与开放超智能。

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Quantized checkpoints for GLM-5.2... NVFP4 quantization of MoE layers and FP8... reduces the model size by >70% while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy recovery on GPQA.
items.whyItMatters: GLM-5.2量化发布，>70%体积缩减，GPQA精度保持SOTA。

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Same-family cross-distillation beats self-distillation... Mean acceptance length 3.05 vs 2.77... Coding +37%, math +47% on Qwen3-32B. 3x lower inter-token latency.
items.whyItMatters: 跨模型蒸馏优于自蒸馏，编码/数学性能提升37-47%。

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: PhysicalRealismBench-U — how the benchmark works... what VLMs still get wrong about basic physics. WorldModelGym...
items.whyItMatters: 新物理现实基准，揭示VLM在基础物理理解上的缺陷。

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Seedream 5.0 Pro is now in Runway. Generate highly detailed images... with legible in-image text in up to 14 different languages. Runway Dev launch.
items.whyItMatters: Seedream 5.0 Pro与Runway Dev发布，支持多语言文字生成。

items.author: @ostrisai
items.text: Krea 2 Turbo Style Reference LoRA. Generate images on the @krea_ai 2 Turbo model in the style of any reference image... Link in 🧵
items.whyItMatters: Krea 2 Turbo风格参考LoRA发布，支持任意参考图风格迁移。

items.author: @threepointone
items.text: ok, 2 things I'm convinced of - every app will have a so called "harness" - "agent to agent" will likely just be english...
items.whyItMatters: 预测每App将集成agent harness，agent间用自然语言交互

items.author: @wandb
items.text: Sixty cycles later... two golds and three of four finishes above the Kaggle median. No human in the loop... One NVIDIA L40... a few dollars.
items.whyItMatters: Agent无人工干预低成本拿下Kaggle级任务，展示生产级潜力

items.author: @willccbb
items.text: doing RL *literally* in production doesn’t really work... but the right way... semi-synthetic task loop... mining tasks from traces + evolving high-fidelity sims
items.whyItMatters: 提出生产级continual RL的semi-synthetic任务循环方法

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: lol there's no window... Midrange consumer hardware will train it in 20 years, but... hobby budget you'll be able to train it in 6.
items.whyItMatters: 预测消费级硬件6年内可训练前沿LLM，加速开源/本地部署

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Under this controlled setup, Cartesia's Sonic-3.5 ranks first overall (1,122 Elo), and leads independently on both US (1,139) and UK (1,103) accents.
items.whyItMatters: TTS模型在Controlled Voice Arena夺冠，Elo分数领先

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: From a model on @huggingface to your own endpoint on @awscloud - in just 1 click! ... Let's go open models!
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face模型一键部署AWS SageMaker

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: One reason we built custom coding and data agent benchmarks internally at Databricks ... Academic benchmarks are great ... but you also care about YOUR tasks
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI撤回SWE-Bench推荐，企业需自建基准

items.author: @MistralAI
items.text: Announcing Robostral Navigate, our first model for embodied navigation: an 8B robotics navigation model that guides robots to autonomously perform tasks specified with natural language. Single RGB camera. State-of-the-art on R2R-CE.
items.whyItMatters: 单RGB相机SOTA具身导航模型，机器人Agent新基准

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Congrats to @SpaceXAI on Grok 4.5 — trained on NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems and purpose-built for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.5用NVIDIA GB300训练，专注coding与agent

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: With @langchain, we’re helping enterprises turn that knowledge into specialized agents they can customize, secure and improve over time.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA+LangChain开源企业级agent stack，基准领先+低成本

items.author: @MatthewBerman
items.text: We audited SWE-Bench Pro, one of the most widely used AI coding benchmarks, and found it no longer reliably measures frontier coding capability.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI撤回SWE-Bench Pro推荐，30%任务失效，coding评测需更新

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: The much-anticipated Grok 4.5 is here, landing at #6 on the Vals Index (65.3%) and nearly 20 percentage points better than Grok 4.3.
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.5 新基准成绩与成本对比，AI Engineer 关注模型迭代信号

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Grok 4.5 is the new SOTA on Harvey Legal Benchmark! @elonmusk @SpaceXAI
items.whyItMatters: 法律 Agent 基准 SOTA，实际应用场景性能参考

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: BREAKING 🔥: OPEANAI LAUNCHED GPT LIVE 1, A NEW FULL DUPLEX VOICE MODEL FOR CHATGPT!
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI 新语音模型全双工架构发布，产品级交互升级

items.author: @steph_palazzolo
items.text: openai announces the “bidi” voice model we scooped in march! https://www.theinformation.com/newsletters/ai-agenda/openai-develops-bidirectional-audio-model-boost-voice-assistants
items.whyItMatters: 双向语音模型细节与发布时间线，工程落地参考

items.author: @skalskip92
items.text: of all the models I evaluated Gemini 3.5 Flash is by far the most accurate what other model should I test?
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Flash 实测准确率对比，日常模型选型数据

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: DeepSeek-V4 can now run locally with Unsloth GGUFs! Run lossless DeepSeek-V4-Flash on 168GB RAM. 3-bit works on 110GB Mac, RAM, VRAM setups. Guide and GGUF links
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek-V4本地GGUF优化，支持低资源运行，开源模型部署门槛降低

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Claude Managed Agents supports both patterns with sub-agents. Escalate up to a Fable 5 advisor, or delegate down to Sonnet 5 workers. Each sub-agent keeps its own cache, so repeat calls don't pay in full for the same context twice.
items.whyItMatters: Claude 多代理系统支持分层委托与缓存，降低成本并提升复杂任务性能

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Gemini Spark can now intelligently track topics and react to events in real time.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Spark 新增实时事件追踪与响应能力，面向业务用户。

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: Congratulations @tylerweitzman - very impressive and I'm thrilled to hear a continuation your Stanford ML work now ranks #1 in TTS!
items.whyItMatters: Stanford ML 项目 TTS benchmark 全球第一

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: We also fixed a llama.cpp issue where KV caching wasn't applied correctly. KV caching makes LLMs O(N) and not O(N^2) - we compared the official DS4 to find the fix. https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/deepseek-v4#llama.cpp-deepseek-v4-implementation-fixes
items.whyItMatters: Unsloth 修复 llama.cpp KV cache 问题，提升开源推理

items.author: @figma
items.text: Our 2026 AI report https://www.figma.com/reports/2026-ai-report/
items.whyItMatters: Figma 发布 2026 AI 报告，洞察设计与开发融合趋势

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Seeing a group of agents collaborate... over 20 agents... processed almost 300 sources... wrote 48 articles on the wiki with 90k words... RL + LLMs.
items.whyItMatters: 20+ Agent协作构建RL+LLMs wiki，已产出9万字研究资源。

items.author: @TheAITimeline
items.text: Is One Layer Enough? Training A Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training. Training a single transformer layer recovers most performance gains... high-impact layers concentrate in the middle.
items.whyItMatters: 单层RL训练即可匹配全参数效果，挑战均匀更新假设

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Universal-3.5 Pro Async is here — native code-switching across 18 languages, our best speaker diarization yet, and contextual prompting. All at $0.21/hr. Learn more: https://www.assemblyai.com/blog/universal-3-5-pro-async
items.whyItMatters: 新语音模型发布，支持多语言切换与上下文，提升转录准确率
